info1: {占领水晶后解锁的建筑,占领方的队伍死亡后,从此建筑复活,占领方的队伍也可以进入此建筑恢复兵力}
info1_en: A structure unlocked after occupying the Crystal. After death, the occupying team respawns from this structure and can also enter it to restore troops.

info1: {每个颜色的阵营都有各自的登陆点,当队伍阵亡后,若没有占领水晶,则从登陆点复活,登陆点也可恢复兵力}
info1_en: Each color faction has its own Landing Site. When a team is wiped out, if the Crystal is not occupied, they respawn from the Landing Site. The Landing Site can also restore troops.

info1: {占领此建筑后,本阵营的所有队伍均会获得'造成伤害提高'效果}
info1_en: After occupying this structure, all teams of your faction gain the 'DMG Dealt Increased' effect.

info1: {占领此建筑后,本阵营的所有队伍均会获得'受到伤害降低'效果}
info1_en: After occupying this structure, all teams of your faction gain the 'DMG Taken Reduced' effect.

info1: {决定战场胜利的建筑,占领该建筑会解锁临时复活点}
info2: {活动结束时,占领该建筑的阵营胜利,如果双方都没有占领水晶,则总积分多的阵营胜利,若积分也相同,则双方均判定为失败}
info1_en: The structure that determines victory in the battlefield. Occupying it unlocks the Temporary Respawn Point.
info2_en: At the end of the event, the faction occupying this structure wins. If neither side occupies the Crystal, the faction with the higher total score wins. If scores are tied, both sides are considered defeated.

info1: {交通节点,若据点内有不同阵营的玩家,会立即发生交战}
info2: {在所有据点中,有部分据点是处于高亮状态的,进入这种据点,可持续获得个人积分}
info1_en: Traffic Node. If players from different factions are inside the Outpost, combat will trigger immediately.
info2_en: Among all Outposts, some are in a highlighted state. Entering such an Outpost grants continuous personal score.
